name: Mac Miller
title: Last known photo of Mac Miller, a portrait from his final press shoot at the Bowery Hotel in New York, posted to his Instagram on September 6, 2018, a day before his death.
description: Mac Miller was photographed at the Bowery Hotel in New York during a press shoot by Christaan Felber for a Vulture profile timed to his fifth studio album, Swimming, released weeks earlier. Miller posted one portrait from the session to his Instagram on September 6, 2018, his final post. A day later, on September 7, he was found unresponsive at his home in Studio City, Los Angeles. A coroner ruled the death accidental; toxicology reported fentanyl, cocaine, and alcohol. He was 26 years old. Background on the shoot and the article is covered in this retrospective video.

lyrics.text:
No matter where life takes me, find me with a smile
Pursuit to be happy, only laughin' like a child
I never thought life would be this sweet
It got me cheesin' from cheek to cheek
And I ain't gonna wait for nothin'
'Cause that just ain't my style
Life couldn't get better
This gon' be the best day ever

bio: Mac Miller (born Malcolm James McCormick) was an American rapper, singer, and producer from Pittsburgh. Over a decade-long career he released five studio albums and was widely respected among peers for a restless musical evolution from mixtape-era party rap to introspective, jazz-inflected songwriting. His posthumous album Circles was released in 2020.

location.name: The Bowery Hotel, 335 Bowery, New York, NY 10003
